headline: AI-native coding tools and design systems lead the window as behavioral training displaces raw model scale.
body: Design system and AI-native tooling are breaking out, anchored by Cursor's growth to 700 people and 60% of the Fortune 500 and by Anthropic's Claude Design positioning as a Figma replacement for design system creation and deployment. A counter-scaling thesis surfaced from Snorkel, where a 4B model finetuned with reinforcement learning and tool discipline outperformed Qwen 3 235B on structured query tasks while self-correcting errors the larger model hallucinated. On the open model side, Gemma 4's 31B variant ranks fourth on LM Arena among open models and runs on single GPUs and phones under Apache 2.0, pushing on-device AI. Security concerns ran parallel, with prompt injection, AI worms, and nonhuman identity failures raised alongside lawyer sanctions for AI-generated fake citations.

cited_items.title: Stop Making Models Bigger, Make Them Behave — Kobie Crawdord, Snorkel
The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
